# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build

variables:
  CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH: "scripts/build.sh"

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH" ]; then
        echo "Running custom build script from repository"
        chmod +x "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH"
        "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_PATH"
      else
        echo "No custom build script found, running default build process"
        # Default build commands can be added here
        echo "Default build steps executed"
      fi
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - merge_requests
  tags:
    - shared
